description: Evaluate headline extraction quality across Claude Sonnet and Gemini Flash models

judges.name: title-accuracy
judges.criteria: Do the extracted headline titles match the expected golden headlines? Are they verbatim quotes from the HTML content, in the correct order of appearance?
evaluation_steps: Count the number of extracted titles vs expected titles (should be exactly 5)
Check if each extracted title appears verbatim in the expected headlines in the same order
Verify headlines are quoted exactly from the HTML, not paraphrased or modified
Confirm the ordering matches the order of appearance in the HTML

judges.name: url-accuracy
judges.criteria: Are the extracted URLs exactly correct and match the golden URLs? Do they represent valid article links from the HTML content?
evaluation_steps: Compare each extracted URL against the expected golden URL for the corresponding headline
Verify URLs are exact matches (case-sensitive for protocol and domain, paths as they appear)
Check that all 5 URLs are present and non-empty
Confirm URLs are plausible article links from the website (not navigation, ads, or spurious content)

judges.name: schema-compliance
judges.criteria: Is the extracted output valid JSON matching the required schema with exactly 5 stories, each containing title, date, and url fields?
evaluation_steps: Verify the output is valid JSON (parseable without errors)
Check that root-level key is 'stories' (not 'headlines' or other variants)
Verify stories is an array with exactly 5 objects
Confirm each story object has exactly the required fields: title (string), date (string), url (string)
